channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Rising red meat prices and production challenges in South Africa
item.description: The article highlights the significant increase in red meat prices compared to chicken in South Africa, with beef mince rising by R12.10 per kilogram and boerewors by R14.56. Consumers are shifting to...

item.title: Mantrac and NMB collaborate to boost equipment financing for mining and construction sectors
item.description: Mantrac and NMB have partnered to provide equipment financing solutions for miners and contractors, aiming to enhance productivity and economic growth in Tanzania. This initiative aligns with broader ...

item.title: Caloocan Vlogger Killed in Attack; Police Launch Investigation
item.description: A police investigation has been launched following the killing of Alicia Lipata, a political vlogger in Caloocan City. The incident occurred after Lipata, who supported former President Ferdinand Marc...

item.title: Two Youths Missing After River Accident in Kaduna
item.description: Two youths went missing after being swept away by a swollen river in Hayin Malam Bello community, Kaduna State, following heavy rains. The incident occurred as they tried to cross the river on their w...

item.title: Political blame game: NSW parties tie opponents to federal controversies
item.description: The article examines the declining primary votes for both major political parties in New South Wales (NSW), highlighting how they are increasingly linking their opponents to federal issues to shift re...

item.title: Spain wins World Cup after defeating Argentina
item.description: Supporters across Sydney and Melbourne erupted in celebration after Spain secured a hard-fought 1-0 victory over Argentina in the FIFA World Cup final. The match, played on July 20, 2026, saw Spain's ...

item.title: World Cup 2026 Guests Include Trump, Box, and Sheinbaum
item.description: The World Cup 2026 event in the United States has attracted a diverse array of high-profile guests, including former President Donald Trump, former Mexican President Claudia Sheinbaum, and other notab...

item.title: Andrew Tate and Brother Face New Charges of Rape and Sex Trafficking After Miami Arrest
item.description: Andrew Tate, a prominent figure in the 'manosphere' movement known for his misogynistic rhetoric, and his younger brother Tristan were arrested in Miami by U.S. marshals on Saturday. British authoriti...

item.title: President Trump's Confusion During Spain's World Cup Celebration
item.description: President Donald Trump, accompanied by FIFA President Gianni Infantino, attended the World Cup trophy presentation ceremony for Spain's victory over Argentina on July 19, 2026. The event took place at...

item.title: Supreme Court Allows Discretion in Sex Offender Registration
item.description: The Supreme Court of Canada has ruled that mandatory registration for all sexual offenders is unconstitutional, shifting the decision to individual judges. This change allows for case-by-case assessme...

item.title: Spain Wins World Cup 2026 as Argentina Players Clash in Post-Match Brawl
item.description: Spain clinched the 2026 FIFA World Cup title with a 1-0 victory over Argentina in the final held in New Jersey. The match, which saw Ferran Torres score the decisive goal, ended in chaos as Argentina ...

item.title: Pensioner Interpreter Gains Recognition for Skilled Performance at Madlanga Inquiry
item.description: Vusumuzi Nkabinde, a 69-year-old court interpreter from Kagiso, gained unexpected fame after delivering a vivid and culturally nuanced interpretation of witness testimony during the Madlanga inquiry. ...

item.title: Trump Booed at World Cup Trophy Ceremony Despite Attendance
item.description: U.S. President Donald Trump was loudly booed by the crowd during the World Cup trophy ceremony following Spain's 1-0 victory over Argentina in the 2026 FIFA World Cup Final. Trump, accompanied by FIFA...

item.title: Organized network enabling illegal Bangladeshi immigration into India
item.description: A large majority of Bangladeshi illegal immigrants entering India are part of a structured labor supply chain, with Indian employers relying on Bangladeshi agents to source cheap labor. The system inv...

item.title: Enugu State Launches New Infrastructure and Tourism Initiatives to Boost Development
item.description: The Enugu State government has approved a series of major infrastructure and tourism projects aimed at addressing housing deficits, improving transportation networks, and promoting ecotourism. Key ini...

item.title: British Authorities Seek Extradition of Andrew and Tristan Tate Over Sexual Exploitation Charges
item.description: Social media influencers Andrew and Tristan Tate have been arrested in Miami following an extradition request from British authorities. The brothers face 59 charges, including seven counts of rape aga...

item.description: Energy Secretary Chris Wright addressed media on July 19, 2026, stating that President Donald Trump’s strategy against Iran remains unchanged despite the killing of two U.S. service members in Iranian...

item.title: RCMP Response to Matthew Hamm's Drowning Under Scrutiny as Family Questions Remain
item.description: The article details the case of Matthew Hamm, a Saskatchewan man whose accidental drowning was officially ruled by authorities, yet his family remains unconvinced. The RCMP's initial response to the i...

item.title: Philippine Coast Guard and Fishermen Rescue Crew from Burning Yacht
item.description: Four crew members were successfully rescued by Philippine Coast Guard personnel and local fishermen from a burning motor yacht, the MY Jason, which caught fire at 1 p.m. in the vicinity of Barangays M...

item.title: FGC Kaduna School Combats Bullying with Strict Measures
item.description: Students at Federal Government College (FGC), Kaduna, face strict consequences for bullying as the school, Parents-Teachers Association (PTA), and management collaborate to eliminate the issue. PTA Ch...
